transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today,
I have Ramyun noodles
I was going to eat some braised pork belly with kimchi
I usually eat Kimchi stew from there and It's really delicious
So I ordered the Boiled pork belly with kimchi
I had some and I automatically knew that I wouldn't be able to finish it
I've been wanting to try this new Caguri noodles (Curry+Neoguri) I never had it before
It's Neoguri with curry
It's supposed to be with cubed curry, but I couldn't find it
I went to like 3-4 markets and convenience store, but they didn't have it
So here I have powder curry
I'm so thirsty because I've been everywhere today
I changed up the menu right now I was going to eat the noodles
But everyone wanted to see the pork belly So here they are
With the ratio of 3

1, 3 half spoons
2, 3
Just a little bit more
2, 3, 4
I think I can add more curry
I think it's pretty good
I can smell the curry
Instead of the raw eggs,
Bon appetit
How will the pork belly taste?
It's not that great
Let's try this
The taste.. It's tasty
The taste..
I can definitely taste the curry
Neoguri taste is still overpowering I think I can add more curry powder

So good
The curry taste is on the noodles It's tasty
It's delicious
But it's not amazing
It's good
Let's add a little more
I think it's better to just eat 10 packs of noodles Without the pork belly
It's good it's good
The umami of it..
The curry taste is not too strong
With some kimchi this time
Yum
I want to take the pork belly out because it's too hard to chew
It's better to eat just the noodles
This wasn't even part of the menu
A lot of people wanted the pork belly so I brought it

I'll eat it later I guess

Refreshing

Tasty

Curry powder

Thank you for the donations
The liquid sauce
It's different from before
The taste is very..
I'll tell you guys later after I finish this
Are you curious?
I was told to put the yolk in here
Let's try some soup
This is Caguri
So much better
The previous one didn't really have the curry taste
It was just like Neoguri with a little bit of curry
But this has a perfect mix of both
Yolk
Let's try it now
Delicious

Really good
The yolk makes it nutty and salty with the flavor of curry
With the egg yolk
Egg yolk
This really does the trick
Putting the egg yolk in makes it nutty and delicious
The egg yolk did everything
This can be applied to regular Ramyun noodles to put the egg yolk on top
It's very nice
The Caguri is on the salty side
But the egg yolk balances that out
And it's nutty
Let's move these to the bowl before they get bloated
The flavor of the soup changed because of the egg
One thing to keep in mind is that it's either a hit or a miss
You can taste the original Caguri flavor without the egg

It will taste hot and spicy
But that goes away if you put the raw egg in
But right now,
I ran out of gas
I'll try these separately Since a lot of you guys never had this before

Pour hot water to the indicator line
Microwave for 3 minutes
